pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly checking for the string within APP_URL.
setup_socioboard.sh which configures the PHP application and export_result.sh which queries this path directly.
Apache virtual host configuration written dynamically inside setup_socioboard.sh which sets DocumentRoot.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real, open-source Socioboard application downloaded directly from GitHub. It is explicitly verified through the setup scripts (setup_socioboard.sh and install_socioboard.sh) that the Socioboard PHP frontend's DocumentRoot is situated at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public and its environment configuration file resides at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env. Furthermore, export_result.sh explicitly queries this path to verify the expected 'https://localhost' substring within the APP_URL field.
